metadata.name: Japan Briefing
metadata.description: Daily news briefing for the NYT Tokyo Bureau Chief

all.headline: NY原油市場 先物価格が上昇 一時1バレル＝100ドル台を再び突破
all.description: 15日のニューヨーク原油市場では、国際的な取り引きの指標となるWTIの先物価格が上昇し、一時1バレル＝100ドルの大台を再び突破しました。アメリカがイラン最大の原油の積み出し拠点を攻撃するなど双方の応酬が一段と激しくなり、ホルムズ海峡の事実上の封鎖が長期化するとの懸念が広がったことが背景にあります。WTIの先物価格は先週、およそ3年9か月ぶりに1バレル＝119ドル台まで急激に上昇したあと、一時は7

all.headline: 政府 石油の民間備蓄 16日から放出へ タンカー大幅減を前に
all.description: 政府は、民間企業に保有を義務づけている石油の備蓄を、16日から放出します。今週中にも日本に来るタンカーが大幅に減るおそれがあり、その前に放出を始めることで、安定供給につなげたい考えです。

all.headline: 政府 艦船派遣めぐるトランプ大統領の投稿 真意見極めたい考え
all.description: イラン情勢をめぐり、アメリカのトランプ大統領がホルムズ海峡への各国の艦船の派遣に期待を示したことから、政府としては、今週予定されている日米首脳会談を前に、閣僚間の電話会談などを通じてトランプ大統領の真意を見極めたい考えです。

all.headline: 新年度予算案 参議院で実質的審議へ 野党協力得られるかが焦点
all.description: 新年度予算案は16日から参議院での実質的な審議が始まります。少数与党の参議院で、政府・与党が目指す年度内成立の実現に向けて、野党の協力が得られるかが焦点となります。

all.headline: 4億円強奪事件 約1時間前に車で現場付近行き来していたか
all.description: ことし1月、東京 台東区の路上で4億円余りが奪われ、暴力団員ら7人が逮捕された事件で、事件のおよそ1時間前に容疑者らが乗ったとみられる車が、現場付近を行き来する様子が、防犯カメラに写っていたことが、警視庁への取材でわかりました。警視庁は、現金が運ばれる日時や場所などの情報を事前に入手し、襲撃する機会をうかがっていた可能性があるとみて詳しく調べています。

all.headline: 米FRB 金融政策決定会合 今週開催 利下げ見送るとの見方強まる
all.description: イラン情勢の緊迫化で原油価格が高騰し、インフレが再び加速することへの懸念が高まる中、アメリカのFRB＝連邦準備制度理事会は、今週、金融政策を決める会合を開きます。金融市場では2会合連続で利下げを見送るとの見方が強まっていて、不透明になっている世界経済の先行きをめぐるパウエル議長の発言が注目されています。

all.headline: IEA 石油備蓄の放出時期 “アジア・オセアニアでは直ちに”
all.description: IEA＝国際エネルギー機関は15日、加盟国で合意したあわせて4億バレルの石油備蓄の放出について声明を発表し、その時期などを明らかにしました。アジア・オセアニアでは直ちに始まるとしています。

all.headline: It's 'Sinners' vs. 'One Battle' as Oscars day arrives
all.description: Experts say the only "sure thing" at this year's awards will be a best actress win for "Hamnet" star Jessie Buckley.

all.headline: Has Timothee Chalamet blown his Oscars chances again?
all.description: The actor's recent comments on ballet and opera aren't likely to have an effect on voting, but his character's ego might.

all.headline: Japan group of war-bereaved families ends overseas memorial tours
all.description: For the final overseas memorial trip planned by the group, about 60 people toured Myanmar for five days from Friday.

all.headline: Lured by profits, some shipowners brave mines and missiles to sneak oil past Iran
all.description: Tactics deployed by shipowners so far include switching off AIS ship-tracking transponders in the hope that vessels become less visible to Iran’s military, and traveling at night.

all.headline: Middle East turmoil revives Norway push for Arctic drilling
all.description: Norway — which is not an EU member but is closely aligned on many issues — has often extolled the virtues of stable energy supplies from a peaceful, democratic country.

all.headline: 'Dubai is safe': UAE pushes to contain fallout from Iran onslaught
all.description: Iran has fired over 1,800 missiles and drones at the Emirates, more than any other country targeted by Tehran in the conflict.

all.headline: Two Japanese nationals flee Middle East on South Korean military plane
all.description: In 2024, Japan and South Korea signed a memorandum on mutual support for the evacuation of their citizens in the event of an emergency in a third country.

all.headline: Italy explores nuclear return after 40 years as energy costs hit
all.description: A pivot to nuclear is central to Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni's plan to thwart Italy’s rising energy prices, which are among the highest in Europe.

all.headline: French far right faces early tests in local votes: What to watch
all.description: Voters in 35,000 municipalities will choose mayors and councilors in a two-round ballot that typically turns on local issues and personalities rather than national party platforms.

all.headline: Orban’s election campaign turns to Russia for help in final stretch
all.description: The Hungarian president has frequently sought to obstruct the European Union’s efforts to support Ukraine and punish Moscow for its invasion.

all.headline: The US may move some of its anti-missile system - and it's sparking unease in South Korea
all.description: Reports say the US may be moving parts of its Thaad system to the Middle East, despite Seoul's opposition.

all.headline: 'No-one will hire women' - India's top court rejects menstrual leave petition
all.description: The subject has polarised India for long, though some states and private companies offer menstrual leaves.

all.headline: South Korea police raid transport ministry over Jeju Air crash

all.headline: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
all.description: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.

all.headline: How Iran war laid bare the world's reliance on Gulf oil and gas
all.description: Countries around the world are feeling the impact of the conflict and the resulting energy price shock.

all.headline: KPop Demon Hunters to return as Netflix announces sequel
all.description: The sequel brings back the co-directors of the first film, which was a smash-hit for the streaming service.

all.headline: Qantas agrees to pay $74m over Covid-19 travel voucher refunds
all.description: The case relates to cancelled flights during the pandemic, for which customers were given credits instead of cash.

all.headline: Chinese national arrested over attempt to smuggle 2,000 queen ants from Kenya
all.description: The suspect had packed some ants in test tubes while others were concealed in tissue paper rolls, prosecutor says.

all.headline: How Indonesia's new sex laws will affect tourists
all.description: International travelers have been flocking back to the popular resort island of Bali as the Covid pandemic subsides, prompting hopes that Indonesia's battered tourism industry is on the road to recove

This 'edible' plastic bag alternative could save Nara's sacred deer
all.description: A local entrepreneur in the Japanese tourist destination of Nara has developed an alternative to plastic shopping bags, to protect the town's sacred deer.

all.headline: The battle to save Sri Lanka's leopards
all.description: Having endured a bloody civil war from 1983 until 2009, Sri Lanka is now at peace and developing rapidly. That's good news for the country as a whole, but the island nation's leopards are under threat

all.headline: Wildlife is flourishing around Fukushima
all.description: Nearly a decade after Japan's Fukushima nuclear disaster, researchers have discovered that wildlife is thriving in the areas evacuated by humans, despite radiological contamination.

all.headline: China debuts 620 kph train prototype
all.description: China has revealed a prototype for a new high-speed Maglev train that is capable of reaching speeds of 620 kilometers (385 miles) per hour.

all.headline: A Shanghai building 'walks' to a new location
all.description: Shanghai residents passing through the city's eastern Huangpu district in October might have stumbled upon an unusual sight: a "walking" building.

all.headline: Self-driving robotaxis are taking off in China
all.description: The world has been inching toward fully autonomous cars for years. In China, one company just got even closer to making it a reality.

all.headline: Travel to Japan during Covid-19: What you need to know
all.description: If you're planning a trip to Japan, here's what you'll need to know and expect if you want to visit during the global coronavirus pandemic.

primary.headline: NY原油市場 先物価格が上昇 一時1バレル＝100ドル台を再び突破
primary.description: 15日のニューヨーク原油市場では、国際的な取り引きの指標となるWTIの先物価格が上昇し、一時1バレル＝100ドルの大台を再び突破しました。アメリカがイラン最大の原油の積み出し拠点を攻撃するなど双方の応酬が一段と激しくなり、ホルムズ海峡の事実上の封鎖が長期化するとの懸念が広がったことが背景にあります。WTIの先物価格は先週、およそ3年9か月ぶりに1バレル＝119ドル台まで急激に上昇したあと、一時は7

primary.headline: 政府 石油の民間備蓄 16日から放出へ タンカー大幅減を前に
primary.description: 政府は、民間企業に保有を義務づけている石油の備蓄を、16日から放出します。今週中にも日本に来るタンカーが大幅に減るおそれがあり、その前に放出を始めることで、安定供給につなげたい考えです。

primary.headline: 政府 艦船派遣めぐるトランプ大統領の投稿 真意見極めたい考え
primary.description: イラン情勢をめぐり、アメリカのトランプ大統領がホルムズ海峡への各国の艦船の派遣に期待を示したことから、政府としては、今週予定されている日米首脳会談を前に、閣僚間の電話会談などを通じてトランプ大統領の真意を見極めたい考えです。

primary.headline: 新年度予算案 参議院で実質的審議へ 野党協力得られるかが焦点
primary.description: 新年度予算案は16日から参議院での実質的な審議が始まります。少数与党の参議院で、政府・与党が目指す年度内成立の実現に向けて、野党の協力が得られるかが焦点となります。

primary.headline: 4億円強奪事件 約1時間前に車で現場付近行き来していたか
primary.description: ことし1月、東京 台東区の路上で4億円余りが奪われ、暴力団員ら7人が逮捕された事件で、事件のおよそ1時間前に容疑者らが乗ったとみられる車が、現場付近を行き来する様子が、防犯カメラに写っていたことが、警視庁への取材でわかりました。警視庁は、現金が運ばれる日時や場所などの情報を事前に入手し、襲撃する機会をうかがっていた可能性があるとみて詳しく調べています。

primary.headline: 米FRB 金融政策決定会合 今週開催 利下げ見送るとの見方強まる
primary.description: イラン情勢の緊迫化で原油価格が高騰し、インフレが再び加速することへの懸念が高まる中、アメリカのFRB＝連邦準備制度理事会は、今週、金融政策を決める会合を開きます。金融市場では2会合連続で利下げを見送るとの見方が強まっていて、不透明になっている世界経済の先行きをめぐるパウエル議長の発言が注目されています。

primary.headline: IEA 石油備蓄の放出時期 “アジア・オセアニアでは直ちに”
primary.description: IEA＝国際エネルギー機関は15日、加盟国で合意したあわせて4億バレルの石油備蓄の放出について声明を発表し、その時期などを明らかにしました。アジア・オセアニアでは直ちに始まるとしています。

screenshots.name: Takaichi Sanae
tweets:
A South Korean military transport plane that recently departed from Riyadh arrived in Seoul carrying three Japanese people.

Thank you to all the Japanese people who made the long journey. I would like to express my gratitude to the Korean government and the Korean military.
Today, I attended the graduation ceremony, appointment and oath ceremony of the National Defense Academy. I would like to extend my heartfelt congratulations to all the graduates and their families.

Daichi Oguri won the silver medal in the men's snowboard banked slalom (SB-LL1/lower limb disability 1 class) at the Milan-Cortina Paralympics! 
Congratulations!

A government-chartered plane carrying a total of 222 Japanese nationals who were staying in Iraq, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia recently arrived at Narita Airport from Riyadh, the capital of Saudi Arabia. Thank you to everyone for your hard work on the long journey.

Momoka Muraoka won her second silver medal in the alpine ski women's giant slalom (seated position) at the Milan-Cortina Paralympics! Congratulations!

In both the first and second runs, he showed great concentration and bravely attacked.
